response.overview: Kuko, Drobček and Ratáfák Plachta were once iconic puppet heroes that everyone knew. Their popularity knew no bounds – until one day they suddenly disappeared from television screens. Today they live in the shadows of oblivion. However, when they meet again after years, they decide to return to the limelight. This time together. The old friends embark on an adventure full of unexpected twists and turns to find out if they still have a place in today's world and if they can stick together. They quickly realize that the road back will not be as easy as they imagined.
response.title: Still Standing, Still Stuffed
